case_title: SEYEDAMIRVALA HAJIMIRSADEGHI VS. SF NORTH POINT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-10-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-15-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HAJIMIRSADEGHI, SEYEDAMIRVALA AS TO DEFENDANT SF NORTH POINT, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JOSE JIMENEZ ON 5/13/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SEYEDAMIRVALA HAJIMIRSADEGHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF NORTH POINT, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE JIMENEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE DEFENDANT NORTH POINT, LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HAJIMIRSADEGHI, SEYEDAMIRVALA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAJIMIRSADEGHI, SEYEDAMIRVALA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, JOSE $3,157.58 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,382.58, SF NORTHPOINT LLC DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
